story.text: The **Second Person Spellbook** (“you”) — the lore that addresses the reader. The City of Mages is maintained distinctly from privacymage’s first-person grimoire; its primary book is the **Tomes** (acts I–IX), with its own cast and its own structural (second-person) grimoire.

## Enter

- 📖 [The Tomes](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors) — the Second Person Spellbook, acts I–IX + cast + specs.
- 🔮 The City’s structural grimoire — workshops, districts, cast *(a wiki home is planned)*.
*Sibling of the [agentprivacy guide](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors). The first-person counterpart is the [Spellbooks](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors).*
